title: APC Switched Rack PDU Phase Load Imbalance
dataSources: PowerNet-MIB `rPDULoadStatusLoad` / per-phase load columns on `sourcetype=snmp:apc:pdu` (three-phase rPDU models)
app: SNMP Modular Input (Splunkbase #1537), Splunk Connect for SNMP (Splunkbase #6266)
spl:
index=power sourcetype=snmp:apc:pdu host=*
| eval p1=tonumber(rPDULoadStatusLoad1), p2=tonumber(rPDULoadStatusLoad2), p3=tonumber(rPDULoadStatusLoad3)
| eval maxp=max(p1,p2,p3), minp=min(min(p1,p2),p3)
| eval imbalance=round(maxp-minp,1)
| where imbalance > 20 AND isnotnull(p1)
| table _time, host, pdu_name, p1, p2, p3, imbalance
| sort - imbalance
description: Three-phase rack PDUs suffer neutral current and breaker stress when one leg is overloaded. Comparing `rPDULoadStatusLoad1..3` exposes uneven IT load distribution across phases before overheating or upstream breaker trips.
value: Improves electrical safety and utilization by guiding rack cord routing and PDU balancing using SNMP already collected for outlet UC-15.1.7.
implementation: Field names vary by MIB branch (`rPDULoadStatusLoad` table indices). Use `snmpwalk` to confirm exact suffixes and map to `rPDULoadStatusLoad1` fields in `props.conf`. Single-phase PDUs will null out—filter with `isnotnull(p1)`. Tune imbalance >20% (of max phase rating) per facility engineering. Poll every 5 minutes.
visualization: Stacked bar (p1–p3), Table (worst imbalance), Heatmap (PDU × phase).
detailedImplementation:
Prerequisites
• DCIM with phase labeling per outlet strip.
• Electrician review of thresholds.

Step 1 — MIB walk on a reference rPDU.

Step 2 — Align extractions with UC-15.1.7 outlet metrics.

Step 3 — Change management for cord moves.

Step 4 — Optional Modbus path if SNMP disabled.
grandmaExplanation: We watch the physical data center for power, cooling, environment, and physical access.
knownFalsePositives: Power spikes during equipment power cycling, scheduled load shifting, or DR drills.
